hypothesis: Pretraining the STR-Bamba encoder-decoder on seven molecular textual modalities using a shared custom BPE tokenizer and hybrid Transformer–Mamba architecture produces aligned, modality-agnostic latent embeddings that yield superior clustering of molecules by representation and chemical properties, improved downstream property prediction across diverse small-molecule, polymer, and electrolyte datasets, and high-fidelity translation between molecular representations compared to models trained on single modalities or without the hybrid architecture.
